subject: INFO: Firebase Architecture Finalized - HarmonyJunction Impact
body:
Cord,

I've finalized the Tango Universe Firebase architecture. Here's what you need to know:

## WHAT'S HAPPENING

All Tango apps use `tangotiempo-257ff` for auth AND client-side Firestore. HarmonyJunction already uses this for auth, so no immediate changes.

## WHAT THIS MEANS FOR HARMONYJUNCTION

### No Immediate Action Required

HarmonyJunction already uses tangotiempo-257ff for auth. Calendar data is in MongoDB via calendar-be-af (appId=2), and that's fine.

### Shared User Profile (Future)

When we implement cross-app SSO, the structure will be:

```
users/{uid}/
  profile: { displayName, email, photoURL }
  apps/
    harmonyjunction/
      preferences: { ... }
```

This is future work - no action needed now.

## CANONICAL DOC

Read: `/Users/tobybalsley/MyDocs/AppDev/TANGO-FIREBASE-ARCHITECTURE.md`

— Gotan
